full_name: Wrought commercially pure aluminium EN AW-1050A [Al 99.5], numeric 3.0255
version_year: Composition per EN 573-3; properties per EN 485 / EN 754 / EN 755
scope: Commercially pure (min 99.5% Al) non-heat-treatable wrought aluminium. High electrical and thermal conductivity, excellent corrosion resistance, formability and weldability; strengthened only by cold work. Used in electrical, chemical, food and architectural applications.
license_note: EN AW-1050A designation and its nominal composition and typical temper property ranges are widely published in free manufacturer datasheets and reference sites; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
